November 10, 2023
Rashéy AngelesNov 10, 2023, 4:54 AM
Di na mkkauwi PTT
November 13, 2023
Rashéy AngelesNov 13, 2023, 11:35 AM
I was a DJ for 13 years. I had countless achievements and awards under my belt.
I bridged new paths even though - I knew some of it were uncertain - and I thought that my life is all gonna be mapped out... and just like always I would figure it out.

For more than a decade of building a strong credible name in various industries. To creating meaningful relationships with different people from all walks of life.

I have managed to destroy all these and more. I have let my friends down. I have hurt my family, and I have brought shame to my community. I lied to people, and even kept lying to myself. The integrity I used to preach to others, was suddenly - gone. At a certain point, I didn’t even know who I was anymore.

The struggle with my health condition on top of my alcohol and substance addiction throughout the years was replaced with the amount of hours I could spend on the felt.

Everytime I was given a seat, it made me feel more alive (even though I already knew - I was already floundering financially)

I bought in to Tournaments outside the Philippines using credit and money that I didn’t have. I would place 2 out of 20 in these different Tournaments and would lose more than what I gain EVERY DAMN TIME.

I played underground illegal cash games thinking I would profit from it so I could use it to pay - but that was never the case. It only made everything worse.

I’ve played a total of 293 days, with more than 3-4 thousand hours of POKER - live tournaments, cash underground, online tournaments, in various stakes… from micro to low, mid, even high roller stakes. I have lost an enormous amount of money. Money that I own, and even money that belonged to others.

I was a whitebelt with one stripe trying to compete in a field of black belts. I didn’t know anything about blowing up a bankroll until this day that I am accounted for a long list of numerous bad debts rooting from my poor decisions in this game, because I didn’t know any better….

I learned and fell madly in love with this new skill that “shookt” my whole life and entire being. I said and did things that I never thought I would say, and do. In the grandest scheme of it all, this new thing that I utterly love - made me lose everything, including myself. Yet allowed me to discover something inside me that I thought was gone. It healed and broke me, both at the same time.

As requested by the people that I heavily owe to go public… so they won’t have to do… I’m ripping this damn band aid off and will gladly do it myself for their peace of mind and satisfaction.

If you think that I am a threat and will bring DANGER to YOU, and to OTHERS around you - do not go anywhere near where I am. Yes you can deny me. We do not have to be friends, we do not have to be associated, and you can even say that you do not know me.

If you think that I will in any way, going to bring trouble in your club, event or tournament - please have my name black listed / banned.

I have turned myself into being averagely liked by the people around me, to being one of the most despised… And while most people in this situation would tell themselves “That’s it for me. I’m done.” and the batshit crazy ones like myself would say otherwise — I’m still here, and I’m not running away. Ready to face it all. Face all the scrutiny, all the shame, and all of the embarrassment it will bring.

Because after all, it is my fault. I was the one that kept dugging this deep hole - and the only person who can take me out of it this, is also ME.

I deeply apologize to everyone I have hurt, and directly affected in this situation. I know that there will never be enough sorrys that can take it all away, but I am hoping that with enough efforts that I am doing everyday to try and solve it will still matter in the end…

Will I make it out of this one alive this time? Is there still a plot twist waiting to happen? There has to be. Because I have to be accountable, and it is my responsibility - and I own up to all of it.

If there is nothing to hide, there is nothing to fear. It’s time to befriend the monsters under my bed. This is my truth.
👍 Joven Del Rosario Ong
